summary: Start the final R0 Recovery Baseline exit validation from synchronized origin/main. Validate repository, task, status, thread, worktree, production-fixture-no-op audit, roadmap acceptance, and R0 scope facts; do not implement R1 or modify product code.

tests_run.command: git fetch origin --prune and git switch -c codex/rr0-exit-validation-001 origin/main
tests_run.result: Clean task branch based on origin/main e8f0050a109d7ade398c63b6950bf3d1a4c9e5b0
Task was READY with RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 CLOSED in main

decisions.decision: Use one systems_architect writer first; spawn one independent qa_reviewer only after a valid REVIEW handoff; close each thread immediately after its terminal handoff.
R0 validates a trustworthy recovery baseline. The recorded authoritative-client-runtime gap is a planned R1 problem and is not hidden or implemented during this Gate.

risks.summary: A process-only PASS without verifying actual origin/main, worktrees, active threads, audit completeness, and forbidden-path scope would be invalid.

requested_action: Run every task-required check plus explicit R0 Gate assertions, write only allowed process/evidence paths, set the task to REVIEW, commit the evidence, and emit a structured systems_architect REVIEW handoff recommending PASS, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK.
